title: Neznámý titulek
content: Mikey Musumeci has just booked his next UFC BJJ bantamweight title-defense and it’s going to be against Kevin Dantzler at UFC BJJ 8 on May 21st, 2026. It will be the first time that the two men have ever shared the mats together, as Dantzler has generally stuck to the superfight circuit and hasn’t yet competed for the biggest promotions in the world. Musumeci on the other hand made his name by dominating major IBJJF events all around the world before pivoting to no gi competition and building an impressive resume as the ONE Championship flyweight champion before moving over to UFC BJJ and winning their inaugural bantamweight title. Musumeci went undefeated across 6 matches during his time with ONE Championship and then won his first match outside of them at UFC Fight Pass Invitational 9. The promotion relaunched with a brand new format as UFC BJJ shortly after that and Musumeci moved along with them, becoming the first bantamweight champion at UFC BJJ 1. He has since successfully defended that title twice and matchmakers now find themselves in the difficult situation of finding him opponents that are both new and challenging for him. Either one is tough seeing as Musumeci has had dozens of matches in one of the smaller weight classes, made even tougher by his tendency to outclass many of the opponents he faces. Dantzler has had some solid performances and won titles on smaller shows over the last few years, genrrally through the use of his tricky guard. He’s probably best known for beating Aljamain Sterling by decision, although he faced criticism from MMA fans for his choice to play guard rather than wrestle. That was a few years ago now though, and Dantzler’s most recent title-fight a few months ago didn’t go his way. He was submitted by rising young contender Andrew DeGraff at the end of 2025 at Finishers: Season’s Beatings and lost his bantamweight title there as a result. UFC BJJ announced the news that Mikey Musumeci is going to defend his bantamweight title against Kevin Dantzler at UFC BJJ 8 in a recent post to their official Instagram account: Tags: Kevin DantzlerMikey MusumeciUFC BJJ
